FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class RadioButtons

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

The WinUI RadioButtons container (microsoft-ui-xaml controls\dev\RadioButtons): a header + a column-major grid of mutually-exclusive RadioButton items with the container keyboard contract.

Layout = ColumnMajorUniformToLargestGridLayout (RadioButtons.xaml:22-26): items flow top-to-bottom column-major into at most maxColumns columns — the first count % columns columns take one extra item (ColumnMajorUniformToLargestGridLayout.cpp ArrangeOverride :48-120; CalculateColumns clamps to min(MaxColumns, count), :132-163 — the available-width clamp needs measure and is not applied here). ColumnSpacing = 7, RowSpacing = 8, header margin 0,0,0,8 (RadioButtons_themeresources.xaml:18-20); header foreground TextFillColorPrimary / Disabled (:4-10).

Keyboard (RadioButtons.cpp): ONE tab stop — the container is IsTabStop=False + TabNavigation=Once (RadioButtons.xaml:5-6) and focus entering the group lands on the selected item (OnGettingFocus redirect, :80-97); here only the selected (or first) item is Focusable, the roving-tab-stop equivalent. Up/Down move focus ±1 in data order (OnChildPreviewKeyDown :135-165 → MoveFocus, :414-447); Left/Right move across columns (:167-183, the XYFocus directional move constrained to the repeater); SELECTION FOLLOWS FOCUS unless Ctrl is held (:100-107). At the edges the key is swallowed when the source is the first/last item (HandleEdgeCaseFocus, :216-242 — WinUI then tries to move focus OUT of the group, which a control factory cannot do; deviation noted). Controlled.

public static class RadioButtons

Methods

Create(IReadOnlyList<string>, int, Action<int>, string?, int, bool, Style?, TemplateParts?)

String items (the WinUI ItemsSource-of-strings shape). parts = the per-item RadioButton template parts (PartRing/PartDot/…), applied to EVERY item (not virtualized).

public static Element Create(IReadOnlyList<string> items, int selectedIndex, Action<int> onSelect, string? header = null, int maxColumns = 1, bool isEnabled = true, RadioButton.Style? style = null, TemplateParts? parts = null)

Parameters

items IReadOnlyList<string>
selectedIndex int
onSelect Action<int>
header string
maxColumns int
isEnabled bool
style RadioButton.Style
parts TemplateParts

Returns

Element

Create(int, Func<int, Element>, int, Action<int>, string?, int, bool, Style?, TemplateParts?)

Element-factory items: itemContent(i) renders each item's content in place of the text label (the WinUI arbitrary-content item wrapped in a RadioButton).

public static Element Create(int itemCount, Func<int, Element> itemContent, int selectedIndex, Action<int> onSelect, string? header = null, int maxColumns = 1, bool isEnabled = true, RadioButton.Style? style = null, TemplateParts? parts = null)

Parameters

itemCount int
itemContent Func<int, Element>
selectedIndex int
onSelect Action<int>
header string
maxColumns int
isEnabled bool
style RadioButton.Style
parts TemplateParts

Returns

Element
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
